name: @codejoo/ffuzzy
description: Fast fuzzy search for the web — WASM port of the ffuzzy C engine. Five search modes, Unicode, TypeScript, browser + Node.

scripts.build: tsdown && terser dist/ffuzzy-fzf.mjs -o dist/ffuzzy-fzf.mjs --module --compress passes=2 --mangle && terser dist/ffuzzy-approx.mjs -o dist/ffuzzy-approx.mjs --module --compress passes=2 --mangle && terser dist/ffuzzy-full.mjs -o dist/ffuzzy-full.mjs --module --compress passes=2 --mangle
scripts.build:engine:all: bash build-engine.sh && FFZ_EDIT_DISTANCE=1 bash build-engine.sh && FFZ_SUBSEQUENCE=0 FFZ_EDIT_DISTANCE=1 bash build-engine.sh
scripts.build:all: npm run build:engine:all && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run build && node scripts/check_api_parity.mjs && node --test

author: jelon <jelon@tbu.net>
